title: Michigan
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Michigan

The Michigan Health Insurance Consumer Assistance Program (HICAP) is run by the Michigan Department of Insurance and Financial Services. Staff can answer questions about health insurance regulations, rights, and responsibilities. They can help you file a complaint or appeal a health plan decision. Get consumer help with a problem or question.

Medicaid in Michigan

You can apply for Medicaid in Michigan by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Michigan

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Michigan

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Michigan

CHIP in Michigan

Michigan MIChild covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Michigan MIChild right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Michigan MIChild.
